I'll search for this reference to verify whether it exists.
Based on my web search, I have found the paper with the exact title and authors cited in the reference.


The paper "Voting by Axioms" by Marie Christin Schmidtlein and Ulle Endriss was published in the Proceedings of the 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS-2023) in May 2023
. 
The paper was a runner-up for the Best Paper Award
.
